Inez
El Azzouzi

Frontend Developer

Creative Developer

Multi-Disciplinary Artisan

About me I started programming for the first time back in 2023, having no idea what programming is.
Though, as someone who loves art, i see this as a different way to translate my creativity into code.
So i started from scratch with no knowledge.
And now, I aspire to become a Creative Developer.
